title: eriocaulaceae
intro: The Eriocaulaceae rank is a family of flowering plants that are commonly known as pipeworts. This family consists of approximately 1,100 to 1,300 species, which are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Eriocaulaceae family is characterized by its unique and often bulbous growth habit, as well as its small, inconspicuous flowers. The plants within this family are typically found in wet environments, such as marshes and swamps, where they thrive in areas with full sun to partial shade.
